JIANGXIAOMOD-RUINANCE.title: Endurance
JIANGXIAOMOD-QING_MANG.title: Azure Flash
JIANGXIAOMOD-QING_MANG.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage (Increases with Astral Skill quality & Basic Mastery).
Reduce target's [gold]Strength[/gold] by {M:diff()} (Increases with Astral Skill quality).
If the target has [blue]Artifact[/blue], damage is multiplied by 5.
[gold]Strike[/gold].
JIANGXIAOMOD-STRIKE_JIANG_XIAO.title: Strike
JIANGXIAOMOD-DEFEND_JIANG_XIAO.title: Defend
JIANGXIAOMOD-BLESSING.title: Blessing
JIANGXIAOMOD-BLESSING_ENEMY_TOKEN.title: Blessing: Enemy
JIANGXIAOMOD-BLESSING_ENEMY_TOKEN.descri: Heal an enemy for {HealAmount:diff()} HP and Stun them.
JIANGXIAOMOD-BLESSING_ALLY_TOKEN.title: Blessing: Ally
JIANGXIAOMOD-BLESSING_ALL_ENEMY_TOKEN.de: Heal all enemies for {HealAmount:diff()} HP and Stun them.
JIANGXIAOMOD-BLESSING_SELF_TOKEN.title: Blessing: Self
JIANGXIAOMOD-CHENG_YIN.title: Seal Bearing
JIANGXIAOMOD-CHENG_YIN.description:
Apply [gold]Seal Bearing[/gold] to an ally.
When damaged, gain {M} stacks of [gold]Regeneration[/gold]; guides the Bell's healing rays.
JIANGXIAOMOD-ZHONG_LING.title: Chiming Bell
JIANGXIAOMOD-ZHONG_LING.description: Release healing rays to heal random targets {Magic:diff()} times, restoring {Heal:diff()} HP each time. Prioritizes allies with [gold]Seal Bearing[/gold].
JIANGXIAOMOD-DAWN.title: Dawn
JIANGXIAOMOD-DAWN.description: Apply {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and {M} stacks of [gold]Dawn[/gold] to an ally.
JIANGXIAOMOD-YEARNING.title: Yearning Aura
JIANGXIAOMOD-YEARNING.description:
Apply [gold]Yearning Aura[/gold] to all allies with [gold]Dawn[/gold].
If none, apply to all units.
Currently provides {M}% Lifesteal.
JIANGXIAOMOD-RETROGRADE_LIGHT.title: Retrograde Light
JIROGRADE_LIGHT.description: Choose [gold]Enemy[/gold] or [gold]Ally[/gold]: Average your HP with the target.
JIANGXIAOMOD-RETROGRADE_LIGHT_ENEMY.desc: [gold]Exhaust[/gold]. Choose an enemy; average your HP with theirs.
JIANGXIAOMOD-RETROGRADE_LIGHT_ALLY.title: Retrograde Light: Ally
JIANGXIAOMOD-RETROGRADE_LIGHT_ALLY.descr: [gold]Exhaust[/gold]. Choose an ally; average your HP with theirs.
JIANGXIAOMOD-RESENTMENT.title: Resentment
JIANGXIAOMOD-RESENTMENT.description: When attacked by an enemy, there is a chance ({M:diff()}%) to inflict a random negative status effect on the enemy.
JIANGXIAOMOD-SPACE_GAP.title: Space-Time Rift
JIANGXIAOMOD-SPACE_GAP.description:
Gain {M:diff()} stacks of [blue]Intangible[/blue].
At [red]Diamond Quality[/red], apply 1 stack of [blue]Intangible[/blue] to all allies.
JIANGXIAOMOD-ABUNDANT_STAR.title: Abundant Star Power
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_CONCEAL.title: Star Concealment
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_CONCEAL.description:
Choose an ally to gain {E:diff()} [blue]Energy[/blue].
At [red]Diamond Quality[/red], affects all allies.
JIANGXIAOMOD-SHADOW_OF_VOID.title: Shadow of the Void
JIANGXIAOMOD-STRENGTHEN_TOKEN.title: Strengthen
JIANGXIAOMOD-STRENGTHEN_TOKEN.descriptio: Choose a card in your deck to Upgrade.
JIANGXIAOMOD-REST_TOKEN.title: Rest
JIANGXIAOMOD-SECONDARY_FACE.title: Secondary Aspect
JIANGXIAOMOD-SECONDARY_FACE.description: Choose 1 card in hand; add {M:diff()} copies of it to your hand. Copies cost 0 and have [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
JIANGXIAOMOD-TEAR_OF_SORROW.title: Tears of Sorrow
JIANGXIAOMOD-TEAR_OF_SORROW.description:
Give all units {M:diff()} stacks of [gold]Tears of Sorrow[/gold].
(If quality is [red]Platinum[/red] or higher, only affects enemies).
JIANGXIAOMOD-CLEAN_TEARS.title: Cleansing Tears
JIANGXIAOMOD-CLEAN_TEARS.description: Remove [blue]Status[/blue] & [blue]Curse[/blue] cards from your and your allies' Draw Pile/Hand/Discard Pile, {M:diff()} cards from each.
JIANGXIAOMOD-UNARMED_STRIKE.title: Unarmed Strike
JIANGXIAOMOD-UNARMED_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage, draw {M:diff()} cards.
(Strengthened by [gold]Unarmed Combat Level[/gold]).
JIANGXIAOMOD-XIA_BLADE_STYLE1.title: Xia Blade Style I: Heartbreak Strike
JIANGXIAOMOD-XIA_BLADE_STYLE1.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
(Strengthened by [gold]Xia Blade Mastery Level[/gold]).
JIANGXIAOMOD-XIA_BLADE_STYLE2.title: Xia Blade Style II: Vertical Cleave
JIANGXIAOMOD-XIA_BLADE_STYLE2.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
(Strengthened by [gold]Xia Blade Mastery Level[/gold]).
JIANGXIAOMOD-XIA_BLADE_STYLE3.title: Xia Blade Style III: Vertical Cleave
JIANGXIAOMOD-XIA_BLADE_STYLE3.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
(Strengthened by [gold]Xia Blade Mastery Level[/gold]).
JIANGXIAOMOD-XIA_BLADE_STYLE_TRUE.title: True Xia Blade Style: House Cleansing
JIANGXIAOMOD-XIA_BLADE_STYLE_TRUE.descri:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
(Strengthened by [gold]Xia Blade Mastery Level[/gold]).
Damage x4 if you have Xia Blade Style I, II, and III.
JIANGXIAOMOD-BASIC_ARROW.title: Basic Arrow
JIANGXIAOMOD-BASIC_ARROW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw {M:diff()} cards with [blue]Archery Mastery[/blue].
(Strengthened by [gold]Archery Mastery Level[/gold]).
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_POWER_ARROW.title: Star Power Arrow
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_POWER_ARROW.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
(Strengthened by [gold]Archery Mastery Level[/gold] & [gold]Star Power Level[/gold]).
JIANGXIAOMOD-WITHERING_ARROW.title: Withering Arrow
JIANGXIAOMOD-WITHERING_ARROW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Inflict {M:diff()} [blue]Poison[/blue] and {D:diff()} [blue]Calamity[/blue].
(Strengthened by [gold]Archery Mastery Level[/gold]).
JIANGXIAOMOD-GOD_SKILL_STRIKE.title: God: Skill Strike
JIANGXIAOMOD-GOD_SKILL_STRIKE.descriptio:
Play all [gold]Basic Skill[/gold] cards.
Each card played increases [gold] Strength by {M} points.
JIANGXIAOMOD-GOD_STAR_STRIKE.title: God: Star Strike
JIANGXIAOMOD-GOD_STAR_STRIKE.description:
Play all [gold]Star Skill[/gold] cards.
Each card played increases [gold] Strength by {M} points.
